personal.name: Ashaen Manuel
personal.title: Software Developer Focused on Real Solutions
personal.bio: Aspiring Software Developer passionate about Artificial Intelligence and Game Development, dedicated to creating technology that solves real-world challenges.
personal.about: My name is Ashaen Manuel, a 22-year-old software developer originally from Sri Lanka and currently based in Melbourne, Australia. I have a strong passion for programming and enjoy building a wide range of software, from simple websites to full-stack applications with database management and deployment. My interests also extend to mobile development, game development, and the integration of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning to analyse data and generate meaningful insights and predictions. I am driven by the idea that software can solve real-world problems and create meaningful impact. Inspired by innovators who built platforms to address real gaps in society, my long-term goal is to develop unique and impactful technology that pushes boundaries and introduces new ideas. I aspire to contribute to organizations that focus on solving real-world challenges through technology, while continuing to grow as a developer and work on solutions that make a lasting difference.

projects.title: Quantum Chess
projects.description: A unique chess game incorporating quantum mechanics, allowing pieces to exist in superposition and collapse based on player actions.
highlights: Developed quantum measurement techniques to manage piece states
Evaluated multiple quantum measurement strategies for optimal gameplay
Showcased expertise in Python and Pygame

projects.title: Melbourne Housing Price Predictor
projects.description: A user-friendly interface for exploring Melbourne housing data and predicting prices based on various inputs.
highlights: Designed intuitive interface for data exploration
Implemented predictive models for price analysis
Utilized React and FastAPI for seamless functionality

projects.title: Chess Puzzle Solving AI
projects.description: Four different AI systems capable of solving complex chess puzzles using advanced search algorithms.
highlights: Implemented Minimax, DFS, BFS, and Alpha-Beta Pruning
Designed AI to evaluate multiple move sequences
Showcased strong grasp of AI methodologies

experience.title: UX Designer Intern
experience.description: Designed a focus-enhancement app targeting users with ADHD and similar attention challenges. Created low to high-fidelity wireframes and interactive prototypes in Figma, collaborating closely with the founder, supervisor, designers, and developers in an agile workflow. Iterated on designs based on user-centered feedback to improve engagement, usability, and focus support.
achievements: Created wireframes and interactive prototypes in Figma for a focus-assist app targeting ADHD and attention-challenged users
Collaborated in an agile environment with founders, designers, and developers to iterate designs
Incorporated user-centered feedback to improve usability, accessibility, and engagement

experience.title: IT Intern
experience.description: Supported IT operations by maintaining systems, developing software prototypes, preparing technical documentation, and assisting with cloud deployment and web hosting on Azure. Applied DevSecOps principles, ensured GDPR and PDPA compliance, and collaborated with cross-functional teams to improve processes and enhance problem-solving and documentation skills.
achievements: Developed sample software prototypes aligned with real-time business requirements, adhering to coding best practices and debugging techniques
Assisted in preparing technical documentation, including RFP and SRS documents, to support software development and business analysis
Gained hands-on experience in integrating DevSecOps principles into the software development lifecycle
Supported cloud deployment and web hosting on Azure, including server configuration and domain management
Evaluated IT processes to ensure compliance with GDPR and PDPA standards, strengthening data protection practices
Collaborated with cross-functional teams, improving communication, teamwork, and adaptability in a professional corporate environment
